sections.paragraph:
i.q. תָּלָה-

(1) to hang up, to suspend, twice found in part. pass. Deuter. 28:66 , “thy life shall be hung up before thy eyes,” i.e. it will ever be in imminent danger.

(2) followed by לְ, to adhere to, to be bent upon any thing (Germ. abhängen, nachhängen). Hos 11:7, עַמִּי תְלוּאִים לִמְשׁוּבָתִי “my people adhere (i.e. indulge) in defection from me.”
